tracks.rawText: 4:31AUDIO-2025-08-07-00-07-16 3v5CoverA Latin big band piece with a strong salsa influence, featuring a female lead vocalist and a male backing vocalist, The instrumentation includes a full brass section with prominent trumpets and trombones, a piano playing montunos, a bass providing a rhythmic foundation, and a percussion section with congas, bongos, and timbales, The tempo is upbeat and danceable, The song is in a major key, creating a lively and celebratory mood, The vocal delivery is energetic and expressive, with call-and-response elements between the lead and backing vocals, Production elements include a clear mix with good separation of instruments, and a slight reverb on the vocals to give them presence1PublishRemix
tracks.title: AUDIO-2025-08-07-00-07-16 3
